title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Vijaya Diagnostics South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Vijaya Diagnostics South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Vijaya Diagnostics South Asia Partners in Agra offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Vijaya Diagnostics South Asia Partners:
Vijaya Diagnostics South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vijaya Diagnostics South Asia Partners!
